summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MedEquipMart medical equipment e-commerce platform. Backend APIs are 97% functional with only Razorpay order creation failing. Frontend UI loads correctly with professional medical design, product catalog, search, and navigation working well. Authentication flow successful. Some routing issues found with dashboard and admin pages.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when creating Razorpay orders

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard page not loading properly after login - routing issue
Admin panel not loading properly after admin login - routing issue
Cart page redirects to login even when user is authenticated

integration_issues.issue: Add to cart works but cart page access requires re-authentication

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, trust badges, categories, and CTA sections
Product catalog displays 15 products with proper category filtering
Search functionality works correctly with query parameters
WhatsApp button displays and is functional
Product display with pricing and availability status
All backend APIs working except Razorpay order creation (35/36 tests passed)
Config endpoint returns correct Razorpay keys and WhatsApp number
User registration and login APIs functional
Admin endpoints for managing orders, enquiries, reviews, verifications working

high_priority: Fix Razorpay order creation API - returns 520 error (check Razorpay configuration)
Fix dashboard page routing - not loading after user login
Fix admin panel routing - not loading after admin login
Fix cart page authentication - redirects to login even when user is logged in
medium_priority: Investigate session persistence issues affecting cart and dashboard access
Test checkout flow end-to-end once Razorpay issue is resolved
low_priority: Add more product cards to homepage featured section (currently showing 0)
Test bulk enquiry and review forms on product detail pages
